---
title: "mcp-server.ts"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/tools/pennyone/mcp-server.ts"
loc: 193
complexity: 16
logic_score: 0.85
style_score: 3.71
intel_score: 2.64
overall_score: 2.69
---

## Intent
A functional component of the Corvus Star static analysis matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Import and utilize via the standard project structure.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 0.8/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.7/10
- **Intel [I]**: 2.6/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 0 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [McpServer](file://@modelcontextprotocol/sdk/server/mcp.js)
- [StdioServerTransport](file://@modelcontextprotocol/sdk/server/stdio.js)
- [z](file://zod)
- [runScan](file://./index.ts)
- [SemanticIndexer](file://./intel/semantic.ts)
- [getDb](file://./intel/database.ts)
- [registry](file://./pathRegistry.ts)
- [*](file://node:path)
- [*](file://node:fs/promises)

### Exports
- `server`
- `results`
- `statsDir`
- `absoluteRoot`
- `absoluteFile`
- `relativePath`
- `flattenedName`
- `qmdPath`
- `content`
- `intentMatch`
- `intent`
- `interactionMatch`
- `interaction`
- `statsDir`
- `absoluteRoot`
- `absoluteFile`
- `relativePath`
- `flattenedName`
- `qmdPath`
- `content`
- `interactionMatch`
- `interaction`
- `statsDir`
- `files`
- `results`
- `content`
- `pathMatch`
- `intentMatch`
- `intent`
- `output`
- `indexer`
- `result`
- `output`
- `ledgerPath`
- `raw`
- `ledger`
- `output`
- `main`
- `transport`
